steps.title: Find the highest season
steps.content: The student is checking the graph for the season when hazelnuts reached their highest price. The relevant comparison is among the hazelnut values for all four seasons.

steps.title: Use the tallest value
steps.content: A, C, and D name seasons where the hazelnut price is lower. The graph shows the tallest hazelnut value in the 2016/17 season. The answer is B.
